meta.title: Autonomous AI in OT
meta.description:
AI is coming. In some ICS it is already here. To create the future you will need to know what autonomous AI is and how it will change the environment the ICS security community is trying to protect and manage cyber risk.

Kence Anderson has been helping over 150 asset owners deploy the right mix of human decision-making, traditional control systems and autonomous AI to improve performance. Improve systems such as rock crushers, aluminum smelters, HVAC, robots, ... He described the present and predicted the future of AI in ICS in his book Designing Autonomous AI. 

In this Keynote, Kence will explain what autonomous AI is and isn't, how it is improving ICS operations and businesses today, the changes it introduces to the systems you need to defend, and give some thoughts on how autonomous AI will require your cybersecurity and risk management programs.
